title: ComplianceAgent Configuration
description: Schema for the Compliance Agent's policies, KYC tier rules, and AML thresholds.

minimum_tier.description: Minimum KYC tier required for card issuance and fund operations.

tier_field.description: Column name in the users table that stores the KYC tier.

single_txn_limit.description: Maximum amount for a single transaction before requiring additional review.

daily_aggregate_limit.description: Maximum aggregate daily transaction amount per user.

interval_hours.description: Interval in hours between periodic compliance summary reports.

include_approved.description: Whether to include approved transactions in the report.
